title: sphaerostephanos loherianus
intro: Sphaerostephanos loherianus, also known as the Loher's fern or the Loher's tree fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryniaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos loherianus include its potential to treat various ailments, such as skin infections and wounds, due to its antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
